title: Sneak peek: Vibe coding AI agents course with Kaggle
summary: Google Cloud and Kaggle are launching a 5-day intensive course on "Vibe Coding" for building autonomous AI agents using natural language. The course covers agent workflows, external API integrations, agent-to-agent communication, and includes a capstone farming simulation project on Kaggle's leaderboard.
